title: Discostegia laevis
intro: Discostegia laevis, also known as Pericarpium Citri Reticulatae, is a plant commonly used in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Discostegia laevis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of this plant include limonoids, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Discostegia laevis is often prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture, and is commonly used to treat colds, flu, and gastrointestinal disorders.
